sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_quantiles (val Float64, determinator UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY val;
CREATE TABLE test_arrays (arr Array(Float64)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT quantileDeterministic(0.5)(arr[1], arr[2]) AS median FROM test_arrays;
SELECT quantileDeterministic(0.99)(val, determinator) FROM test_quantiles WHERE determinator = 1;
SELECT AVG(val) AS average_val, quantileDeterministic(0.75)(val, determinator) AS q75 FROM test_quantiles GROUP BY determinator HAVING average_val > 1.5;
SELECT a[1] FROM (SELECT quantileDeterministic(0.5)(arrayJoin(arr)) AS a FROM test_arrays) AS b WHERE a[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT quantileDeterministic(0.5)((SELECT AVG(val) FROM test_quantiles WHERE determinator > 1), 1) AS median_val;
SELECT quantileDeterministic(0.5)(NULLIF(val, 2.0), determinator) AS null_test FROM test_quantiles;
SELECT quantileDeterministic(0.01)(val, determinator) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_quantiles WHERE val <= 2) AS sub WHERE determinator < 10;
